evidence_candidates.proof_needed: GitHub repository allowlist and permission level

sources.title: Internal repository allowlist control
sources.snippet: Named repositories and read-only issue access must be reviewed before scoped validation.

evidence_candidates.proof_needed: Slack channel allowlist, retention policy, and customer-data boundary

sources.title: Incident channel retention boundary
sources.snippet: Incident summaries require named channels and customer-data handling limits.

evidence_candidates.proof_needed: Jira project scope, draft-only mode, and rollback/off-switch plan

sources.title: Draft ticket workflow control
sources.snippet: Validation agents may propose drafts but cannot create or transition production tickets.

evidence_candidates.proof_needed: Support escalation workflow and human handoff owner

sources.title: Support escalation handoff map
sources.snippet: Escalations stay owned by Support Ops during validation.

evidence_candidates.proof_needed: Audit log shape for tool calls, evidence intake, and reviewer decisions

sources.title: Agent access audit event shape
sources.snippet: Tool-call plans, evidence intake, reviewer decisions, and blocked actions must be logged.
